title: Trinkets
content:
My mind a buzz saw,
        wood chips in decapitated thought
        soil chilblained hands

        II
        Cleansing wood,
        the keen smell of sawdust
         - good, raw earth drenching
        the nostril, clean odour
        of nature like my brain,
        a broomstick sweeping
        the coffee pot speaking ...
        bubbles massed in steam
        inchoate in their pensive rivulets.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Trinkets", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
